steps.observed: URL resolved to /admin/categories and an error toast 'Invalid category ID' was displayed

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught runtime exception observed. Console logged expected 400 failed-resource errors during invalid duplicate lookup.
evidence.network: Authenticated fetch /api/admin/categories/abc/duplicate -> 400 with body {"error":"Invalid category ID"}; UI then showed error toast on /admin/categories.

summary: Validated VAL-CAT-032 and it now passes: invalid duplicate category ID redirects to /admin/categories and shows an error toast.
